creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ganael LAPLANCHE from comment #2)
> Raknet is no more maintained and has been archived upstream, see:
:
> This port is old and probably nearly useless by now.
>
> I have forced GCC to version 11 but we probably want to deprecate
> it sometime soon or at least when it becomes un-maintainable.

I believe this time has come: GCC 11 has become unmaintained upstream
half a year ago. We already dropped gcc11-devel and gcc11 should follow
in the coming months, so I'm thinking to add a deprecation two months
out, say. Thoughts?
